name: crm
title: CRM
description: Leads, companies, contacts, deals, and activities — lead capture, conversion, and a stage-tracked sales pipeline.
author: Ion Shift Labs <hello@ionshiftlabs.com>

secrets.crm_inbound_token: Shared token the inbound_lead hook requires in its x-crm-token header.

actions.name: convert_lead
actions.description: Convert a lead into a company + contact (de-duplicated) and optionally a deal, then mark the lead converted.

create_deal.description: Also open a deal for the new company/contact

deal_title.description: Title for the created deal (defaults to "<company> — new deal")

actions.name: set_deal_stage
actions.description: Move a deal through the pipeline: applies the stage's default probability, stamps closed_at / lost_reason on close, and logs a note activity.

lost_reason.description: Required context when moving to closed_lost (defaults to "other")

actions.name: log_activity
actions.description: Log a call/email/meeting/task/note against a contact, company, and/or deal, stamping last_activity_at on the linked contact and deal.

hooks.name: inbound_lead
hooks.description: Web-to-lead capture endpoint — POST a form payload with the shared x-crm-token header to create a lead (de-duplicated by email).

objects.name: leads
objects.description: Unqualified inbound interest — captured, worked, then converted into a company/contact/deal or disqualified.

fields.name: company_name
fields.description: Company name as captured — becomes (or matches) a companies record on conversion.

objects.name: contacts
objects.description: People at the companies you work with.

objects.name: deals
objects.description: Revenue opportunities moving through the pipeline. Every change is recorded in deal_history.

fields.name: probability
fields.description: Win likelihood in % — set_deal_stage applies per-stage defaults.

fields.name: closed_at
fields.description: Set by set_deal_stage when the deal reaches closed_won/closed_lost.

fields.name: last_activity_at
fields.description: Stamped by the log_activity and set_deal_stage actions.

objects.name: activities
objects.description: Calls, emails, meetings, tasks, and notes — linkable to a contact, company, and/or deal.

objects.name: tags
objects.description: Freeform labels attachable to contacts, companies, and deals.

objects.name: deal_history
objects.description: One row per deal change, written by the persist_event subscription on data.deals.updated — powers stage-velocity reporting.

fields.name: diff
fields.description: System-field-free field diff: { field: { before, after } }.

fields.name: snapshot
fields.description: Full after-image of the deal at the time of the change.

fields.name: changed_by
fields.description: Actor id (user or API key) that made the change; empty for system writes.

leads.title: VP Operations
leads.notes: Requested a demo via the pricing page.

roles.name: crm_agent
roles.description: Full read/write access to CRM objects; deal history is read-only (written by the event subscription).

roles.name: crm_viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to every CRM object.

tasks.name: crm-daily-digest
tasks.description: Logs a daily CRM activity digest (disabled by default; enable and customise).
